incidents.title: Exec Approval Timeouts — All Commands Blocked
incidents.description: Every exec command was auto-denied after 2-minute approval timeout. Jet could not run any CLI tools, check email, send messages, or perform any operational tasks.
incidents.resolvedAt: April 5, 2026 — tools.exec.ask set to off, tools.exec.security set to full

incidents.title: Anthropic API Credits Depleted
incidents.description: Cron jobs failed (morning briefing, Printing Press daily) due to insufficient API credits. All LLM-dependent tasks stopped.
incidents.resolvedAt: April 4, 2026 2:27 PM ET — credits topped up

incidents.title: Google Auth — Both Accounts Timing Out
incidents.description: OAuth tokens expired for both jet@nik.co and nik@nik.co. All Gmail, Calendar, Drive, and Contacts API calls failed with 60s timeouts for 4 consecutive days.

incidents.title: 9-Day Gateway Outage
incidents.description: Gateway went down after openclaw gateway restart unloaded the LaunchAgent. Complete blackout — no heartbeats, cron, or messaging for 9 days.
incidents.resolvedAt: April 1, 2026 — Watchdog LaunchAgent deployed to prevent recurrence
